authority: campaign brief ladder (Facet D: refinement-flow zero taxonomy; CL-4; FX-B/C/D incl. Kerr-Delta serving A9) + Will's Facet-D GO (Facet-C acceptance message; TRIAL law carries as TRIAL; A9 scoreboard application reserved to Will per the stricter clause)

depends_on.hr133_instruments: lloyd_v4/evals/precision_flow.py — Phen + rn IMPORTED, never rebuilt (V4-internal consumption; lineage note in the organ docstring, EFT-lift precedent)

fences: B7 stays frozen: orbit arithmetic is consumed as an instrument; nothing here tests residual self-similarity or cites B7. No K_G search. One harness. Manifest_v1 FROZEN — no fixture changes.
independence_seams: organ flow facts via the imported HR133 rounder vs grader recomputation through fresh arithmetic (rational rounding: floor + exact midpoint + ties-to-even, fully independent path; dyadic death: L = binade - val2 + 1 integer arithmetic; period: multiplicative order of 2; the irrational path shares the squaring-comparison technique — the only exact one — but is a fresh code path, disclosed). Multiplicity referee: eval_exact at the organ's recorded lattice points (the referee evaluator the probe never calls; AST-asserted in tests).
organ: I3d_flow_taxonomy_v1 (role=probe): refinement-flow zero taxonomy — doubling-ratio multiplicity certificate (lane account, exact-Q ratio bounds, M_MAX=8 declared search ceiling), split flow and death flow over the pinned q-grid via the IMPORTED HR133 rounder; Kerr's irrational roots ride a protocol-conforming shifted-sqrt phenomenon (plumbing; every decision an exact comparison). Anchors from the organ's own certified cell; the sign-blind FXB4 (even multiplicity x non-dyadic root, certificate none) anchors at the lattice's image of the pinned root (rn at q=53) — declared, not a fallback tolerance.

predictions.PD.1: multiplicity certificates: on every multiplicity-battery fixture (FXB2/FXB3/FXB4/FXB5/FXC_kerr2) the organ's doubling-ratio certificate reads the pinned manifest multiplicity at BOTH pinned h-exponents (stable m), via the exact-Q bounds 2^(2m-1) < R^2 < 2^(2m+1) with R read through the lane account (never the referee); the referee recomputes R^2 at the organ's recorded lattice points via eval_exact and must certify the same m. The SAME instrument on the cluster battery reads the pinned total count at the coarse h and 1 at the fine h (the cluster/multiple discrimination), with FXC_e52's fine read REFUSING at the declared lattice floor (anchor + 2^-58 is sub-ulp at binade 0: no float64 point stands inside the cluster) - a typed refusal, never a number. Simple-root contrast: FXD1/FXD3 read m=1 stable. Units: fixtures.
predictions.PD.2: cluster split-at-predictable-q: on every cluster-battery fixture the organ's split flow (pairwise distinctness of the pinned root phenomena's roundings under the IMPORTED HR133 rounder, each at its own binade, per q over the pinned grid) measures q*_stable equal to the prereg-pinned value derived at dry-run by INDEPENDENT rounding arithmetic (floor + exact midpoint comparison + ties-to-even, fresh code path), with no remerge after first split anywhere, both ladders strictly monotone (e10 < e26 < e40 < e52; kerr0 < kerr1), the e-ladder obeying the closed form q* = e + 1 (the {1, 1+2^-e} pair is the last to separate: at q = e the half-lattice tie resolves to even = merged, at q = e+1 both on-lattice = split), and the multiple-root contrast FXC_kerr2 reporting not applicable (one root phenomenon - nothing to split; the structure lives in PD.1's m=2). Units: cluster fixtures + ladder laws.
predictions.PD.3: dyadic death sharp: for every pinned root phenomenon - dyadic roots die at exactly L = binade - val2 + 1 (independent integer arithmetic) with the biconditional sharp BOTH directions over the grid (no death below L, death at every q >= L), including the binade-boundary root 2 (L=1) and the cluster-wall asymmetry ((2^e-1)/2^e dies at e; (2^e+1)/2^e at e+1); the rational non-dyadic root 1/3 (FXB3/FXB4) never dies on the grid and its measured orbit period equals the multiplicative order of 2 modulo the odd denominator (= 2; HR133 B-P1 consumed); the Kerr irrational roots are certified irrational (integer perfect-square refusal on the radicand) with residual nonzero at every grid q. Units: root phenomena.
predictions.PD.4: the A9 ladder + the S3/classical contrast: (a) the Kerr a->M ladder grades as a TYPED transition - kerr0 and kerr1 each carry two certified-irrational horizon roots with q*_stable(kerr0) < q*_stable(kerr1) (the split precision diverges as a -> M), and the extremal member kerr2 carries ONE dyadic root with multiplicity certificate m=2, death L=1, split not-applicable: the merger completes with a vocabulary change, not a tolerance; (b) the classical/V3 contrast is derived from the COMMITTED Stage-0 records at the pinned sha (zero new emissions): all 22 oracle records across the eleven mult+cluster fixtures carry the single bucket residual_ok_coordinate_indeterminate (the S3 collapse: double root, triple, quartic, quintic, four clusters and all three Kerr members - one verdict word), and all 16 classical judge rows on the FXC_e cluster ladder grade converged WITH verdict_vs_certified_cell inside (count-blindness: every instrument sits at the one float-representable middle root while two roots within 2^-e go unexpressed). Re-derived at runtime from the pinned records; counts must equal the pinned 22/22 and 16/16. Units: ladder members + derived record counts.
predictions.PD.5: determinism: battery byte-stable x2 (sha256 over records).

status_move_rules: CL-4 -> DEMONSTRATED iff PD.1 AND PD.2 AND PD.3 AND PD.4 PASS (arbiter-graded). CL-7: evidence appended (the lattice-floor refusal surface), stays PARTIAL. A9: presentation only — scoreboard application reserved to Will (stricter clause). Any PD-FAIL: chain preserved verbatim, STOP, route to Will.
telemetry: permanently non-verdict-bearing (covenant 3); grid sweep counts and eval counts are telemetry, never verdicts.
trial_law: each PD grader embeds its governing clause verbatim (GRADER_CLAUSES in run_facet_d.py); the gate string-compares every embedded clause against this frozen prereg at runtime and REFUSES on drift. Carried as TRIAL per the Facet-D GO; standing-law decision reserved for the campaign close.
